summary: Matchly Pro: 20-21 Nisan Elite bülteni yayında! Tüm VIP skorlar ve analizler güncellendi. 🚀🎯

matches.analysis: Both teams are prolific scorers in Asian competition. Vissel Kobe strong at home, Al Ahli dangerous on the break.
Real Madrid U19 have been dominant. Brugge competitive but the Spanish side's quality should have been enough.
Lechia Gdansk were solid but couldn't break down Piast's defense.
Tight Swedish second-tier match that surprisingly went in favor of Osters.
Midtjylland strong in the championship group. Quality prevailed in this title race clash.
Union Carl Berner runaway leaders in this division. Clear away win achieved.
Both teams prioritized defensive solidity as predicted. Minimal goalmouth action.
A shocking upset in the Hungarian second tier. Vasas dominance was broken.
Den Bosch failed to contain Jong Utrecht's youthful counter-attacks.
Controlled home win achieved at Riazor. Promotion push continues.
Fiorentina couldn't find the net against a stubborn Lecce defense.
Low-scoring affair as expected but ended in a draw.
A defensive London derby where Palace failed to find the net.
Tight low-scoring home win achieved as Moreirense's form held.
Narrow home win achieved. Boston River solid at home.
Platense couldn't secure the win. Cordoba held them to a draw.
Independiente Mendoza grabbed a surprising away win against Banfield.
Seoul strong at home in K-League. Bucheon struggling with defensive issues away.
Both teams score consistently. Open game with goals expected.
Jeonbuk dominant force at home. Comfortable home win expected.
Beijing Guoan in excellent form. Away win with goals likely.
Chengdu in devastating form. Heavy home win expected.
Home advantage crucial in this Austrian relegation battle.
CSKA Moscow solid at home. Low-scoring controlled home win expected.
Hajduk Split dominant at Poljud. Croatian league leaders should cruise.
Tight low-scoring home win expected at Son Moix.
Athletic Bilbao formidable at San Mames. Basque side to win.
Standard and Antwerp both score regularly. Open competitive match expected.
Genk strong at home. High-scoring home win likely.
Both teams to score looks the safest bet here.
Saints promotion push continues with comfortable home victory.
Foxes quality should shine through at the King Power.
Both teams involved in high-scoring matches. Goals expected.
Tight match with goals at both ends. Barnsley pushing for playoffs.
Both teams in good scoring form. Chelsea slight favorites.
Inter Milan dominant force at San Siro. Comfortable victory expected.
Lens defensive solidity key in this cup tie.
Cruz Azul in strong form (4th place, 29 pts) while Queretaro struggling near bottom (16 pts). The Machine should take all three points on the road.
Cartagines solid at home in Costa Rican league. San Carlos poor away form with defensive vulnerabilities. Low-scoring home win expected.

Monterrey (14th, 15 pts) coming off 1-3 loss to Pachuca but still heavy favorites at Estadio BBVA. Puebla (16th, 13 pts) destroyed 0-5 by Guadalajara last match, 6 games without a win. Both teams already eliminated from Liguilla.
America (6th, 22 pts) in better form than Leon (8th, 22 pts). The Eagles have more quality and should edge this Mexican league clash.
Indonesian league open and high-scoring. Both teams in decent form. Expect goals at both ends in this morning clash.
REAL FORM: Seoul are TOP of K-League 1 with 22 pts (7W 1D 1L). They just beat Bucheon 3-0 on April 21st. Bucheon in 6th with 10 pts (2W 4D 3L). Seoul dominant force at Sangam Stadium.
Pohang strong at home in K-League. Gwangju struggling away with recent losses. Steelers' solid defense should keep a clean sheet.
Daejeon solid at home, just beat Seoul 1-0 away on April 18. Jeju struggling away form. Home advantage should prove decisive in Korean league.
Both teams involved in open matches recently. Chinese Super League high-scoring. Expect goals at both ends in this afternoon fixture.
Shanghai SIPG dominant force in Chinese Super League, winning 5 straight. Qingdao Jonoon struggling near the bottom. Heavy home win almost certain.
REAL FORM: Zenit are TOP of Russian Premier League with 55 pts (16W 7D 2L). Lokomotiv 3rd with 48 pts. Zenit won their last 5 matches. Clear league leaders and favorites for this away clash.

REAL FORM: Both teams level on 35 pts (9W 8D 8L). Dinamo Moscow unbeaten in last 3 at VTB Arena. Rubin Kazan missing key players: Daku (suspension), Iwu, Jukic, Shvets (injuries). Home advantage decisive.

REAL FORM: PSG unbeaten in 19 of last 20 home matches vs Nantes. Over 2.5 goals in 8 of PSG's last 9 Ligue 1 games. Nantes drew last 3 matches but PSG's 35 goals in 21 games is league-best. Total mismatch at Parc des Princes.
Atletico Madrid in excellent form, winning 4 of last 5. Elche struggling near the relegation zone. Simeone's defensive organization should shut out the home side.
Bosnian title race clash. Zrinjski strong at home but Banja Luka competitive away. Tight match with both teams finding the net.
Union SG dominant in Belgian championship playoffs, winning 5 straight. Gent competitive but Union's home form overwhelming. Solid home win expected.
Club Brugge in devastating form at Jan Breydel, 5 straight wins. Mechelen struggling away in playoffs. Heavy home win the most likely outcome.
Ipswich Town pushing for automatic promotion, strong away form. Charlton mid-table with little to play for. Tractor Boys should take the points.
Birmingham solid at home in Championship. Preston inconsistent away with scoring issues. Low-scoring home win looks the safest bet.
REAL FORM: DFB Pokal SEMI-FINAL! Bayern won last 5 matches. Leverkusen lost 2-1 to Augsburg last match. Bayern 1.32 favorites. Musiala back from injury. Pokal classic between two Bundesliga giants.
Cardiff City heavy favorites against struggling Port Vale. Bluebirds pushing for promotion. Comfortable home win expected at Cardiff City Stadium.
French Cup semi-final clash. Strasbourg solid at home, Nice dangerous away. Competitive match with goals at both ends.
Coppa Italia semi-final! Atalanta in devastating form at Gewiss, 5 straight wins. Lazio competitive but Gasperini's attack overwhelming. Expect a thrilling cup tie in Bergamo.
Bournemouth strong at Vitality Stadium. Leeds inconsistent away in Premier League. Cherries' attacking quality should see them through.
Portuguese Cup semi-final, O Classico! Porto won last 5 at home. Sporting also in excellent form. Both teams score consistently. Tense cup derby with goals guaranteed at Estadio do Dragao.
Both teams are attack‑minded and matches between them regularly produce goals. AL Wahda's away form suggests they will contribute to an open game.
Both sides leak goals but carry a threat going forward. Over 2.5 is a solid value pick with two inconsistent defences.
Esperance are a dominant force at home and face a Zarzis side in dreadful form. A comfortable home win with a clean sheet is expected.
A typical relegation group clash where both teams prioritise not losing. Tight, physical game with few chances expected.
Both teams need points in the promotion race and recent meetings have been lively. The odds underestimate the chance of a high‑scoring affair.
Extremely low total goals expectation. Both teams are among the lowest scorers in the league and will be cautious in a relegation battle.
Liepaja are far superior and in strong away form. Super Nova are struggling but often score at home, so an away win with goals is likely.
Cup ties between these two often deliver goals. Trabzonspor's aggressive style leaves space, and Samsunspor are capable in attack.
Randers are strong at home in the relegation group and Fredericia are vulnerable away. The over 2.5 market is heavily backed.
Two attacking teams in the championship group. Previous meetings have been goal‑filled, and the odds accurately price a high‑scoring contest.
Spartak Moskova and Krasnodar are both well‑matched attacking sides. The odds suggest goals, and the head‑to‑head supports over 2.5.
Akhmat are defensively solid at home, while Baltika struggle to score away. A low‑scoring affair is highly probable.
AZ Alkmaar's games are rarely dull. Eagles are competitive at home and will push for goals. The low odds for over 2.5 reflect the market sentiment.
Levante are fighting to avoid relegation and are strong at home. Sevilla have been inconsistent on the road, giving value to the home side.
Early‑season Allsvenskan often sees cagey away performances from AIK. Degerfors lack cutting edge up front, making under 2.5 the smart play.
Malmö are the league's top scorers at home, and Sirius often concede but can grab a goal. The match is set up for over 2.5.
Beşiktaş are in fine form and the Turkish Cup produces goals. Alanyaspor can be dangerous on the counter, but the home side should dominate and secure a high‑scoring win.
Braga are a class above and Casa Pia are in poor shape. The visitors should claim a straightforward victory, likely with a clean sheet.
A tight championship group encounter between two tactical sides. Both defensive records are strong, and history shows low‑scoring clashes.
Damac are strong at home and face an out‑of‑form Al Akhdood. The hosts should secure a win with a clean sheet, but the match may open up if they score early.

Defensores de Justicia host Boca Juniors in the Argentine Primera Division opening round fixture. Boca Juniors bring their big-game pedigree but historically struggle away against physical lower-mid-table sides in Argentina. Def. Justicia are hard to beat at home and have won 2 of their last 3. With Boca's attacking quality and the hosts' competitive home record, goals from both sides is the best value bet.

Deportivo Pasto host Independiente Santa Fe in the opening round of the Colombian Primera A. Pasto are historically strong at home in Pasto's high altitude, which makes life difficult for visiting teams. Santa Fe have struggled on the road this season with 2 losses and 1 draw in their last 3 away fixtures. The altitude advantage and Pasto's solid home record make them the pick.

Universidad Católica host CSD Macara in the Ecuador Pro League. Católica are one of Ecuador's top clubs and are comfortable at home — 3 wins from their last 4 home games. Macara have been poor away from home with 3 defeats in their last 4 road trips. Católica's home dominance in Ecuadorian football makes them a confident pick.

Kaiserslautern host Eintracht Braunschweig in the 2. Bundesliga at Fritz-Walter-Stadion. Kaiserslautern have 14 wins in 30 league games and are mid-table promotion chasers with 49 goals scored. Braunschweig sit lower with just 8 wins from 30 matches and a poor defensive record of 50 conceded. Lautern's home advantage and greater quality make them the clear favourites.

Fortuna Düsseldorf host Dynamo Dresden in the 2. Bundesliga. Düsseldorf are pushing for promotion and have strong home form. Dresden are struggling badly with 4 defeats in their last 5 away matches and sitting in relegation trouble. Düsseldorf's quality, home advantage, and Dresden's alarming away record all point to a home win.

AL Hazem host AL Riyadh in the Saudi Pro League. Both sides have shown a habit of scoring — each team has netted in their last 4 consecutive matches. With similar mid-table ambitions and attacking intent on both sides, this fixture has the hallmarks of an entertaining, goal-filled encounter in the Saudi top flight.

RB Leipzig host Union Berlin in the German Bundesliga at Red Bull Arena. Leipzig are in strong form — 4 wins in their last 5 — chasing a European spot. Union Berlin are in the bottom half, having lost 3 of their last 5 including their last two away games. Leipzig's attacking depth, home support, and Union's poor road form make Leipzig clear favourites in this Bundesliga clash.

Napoli host relegation-threatened Cremonese at the Diego Armando Maradona in a crucial Serie A Round 34 fixture. Napoli sit 3rd and need points for their Champions League spot. Cremonese have managed just 1 win in their last 14 matches and have not beaten Napoli in Serie A for 32 years. With De Bruyne, McTominay and Hojlund available, Napoli should control this comfortably. Key absences: Lukaku (muscle), Di Lorenzo (knee) for Napoli; Vardy (muscle), Thorsby for Cremonese.

Shelbourne host Drogheda United at Tolka Park in the League of Ireland Premier Division. Shelbourne won the last H2H meeting 2-1. Drogheda are in poor form — no wins in their last 5 and just 2 wins from 11 league games this season. Both sides have suffered consecutive defeats recently, but Shelbourne's home advantage and superior H2H record give them the edge in this derby encounter.

St. Patricks Athletic host Bohemians in one of the best Dublin derbies in Irish football. St. Pat's have been in decent form — 3 wins in their last 5 — and have beaten Drogheda United 3-1 in their most recent match. Bohemians have struggled on the road, losing their last 2 away games. Richmond Park's atmosphere and St. Pat's home record should see the hosts take the three points.

Waterford host Galway United at RSC in a balanced League of Ireland Premier Division clash. Both sides have shown attacking intent this season and the fixture has historically produced goals. With both teams in similar mid-table positions and inconsistent form, a goals-heavy encounter with both sides finding the net is the most attractive betting angle.

Istanbul Basaksehir host Kasimpasa in a Turkish Super Lig mid-table clash. Basaksehir have dominated this fixture historically — 4 wins in their last 5 H2H meetings with no losses. Both teams have lost just once in their last 5 games. In 4 of their last 5 encounters, both sides have found the net. Basaksehir's home advantage and superior H2H record make them the pick here.

Monza host Modena in the Italian Serie B with promotion ambitions. Monza have been one of the more consistent sides in Serie B and are strong at home. Modena are winless in their last 4 and sit in serious danger of relegation. The class difference and home advantage should deliver a comfortable win for Monza in this second division clash.

Lyngby BK host Esbjerg in the Danish 1. Liga promotion group. Lyngby are pushing hard for promotion — 3 wins in their last 4 home matches — with a settled squad and promotion ambitions. Esbjerg have been in terrible form with 4 defeats in their last 5. This promotion group clash at home should deliver a Lyngby win as they look to seal their top-flight return.

Ljungskile host Helsingborg in the Swedish Superettan. Helsingborg are one of the division's most experienced clubs and come into this game with 3 wins in their last 4 including an away win. Ljungskile have been inconsistent — 2 defeats in their last 3 home games. Helsingborg's quality and current momentum give them the edge away from home.

Lens travel to Brest in a pivotal Ligue 1 title race clash. Lens are 2nd, just 1 point behind PSG, and are flying — 4 wins in last 5 including a stunning 4-1 Coupe de France semi-final win over Toulouse. Brest are winless in 4 straight league games but have scored in each of their last 4 home matches. Lens have won the last 4 H2Hs and scored in 11 consecutive away games. Both teams to score is the standout value bet in this wide-open fixture.

Annecy host Pau in France's Ligue 2. Annecy are in decent mid-table form with 3 wins in their last 5 home games and pushing for a top-10 finish. Pau have been struggling badly — 4 defeats in their last 5 matches — and have the worst away record in the division's bottom half. Annecy's home strength and Pau's dreadful road form point clearly to a home win.

Relegated Montpellier are using Ligue 2 as a springboard back to the top flight. They have been outstanding all season — 3 wins in their last 4 — and sit near the top of Ligue 2. Amiens are a mid-table side at home and have been inconsistent. Montpellier's quality, ambition and consistent away scoring record make them strong favourites here.

Red Star host Guingamp in a competitive Ligue 2 mid-table clash. Both teams have been scoring regularly this season and the H2H history shows goals from both sides in recent meetings. Red Star's home form has been solid with 3 wins in their last 4, while Guingamp are an attack-minded side who always provide entertainment. Both Teams to Score is the standout value pick.

Clermont host SC Bastia in the French second division. Clermont have been one of the better home sides in Ligue 2 with 3 wins in their last 4 home matches and a settled squad. Bastia have struggled on the road — 2 losses in their last 3 away games — and the travelling support adds to the atmospheric challenge. Clermont's home advantage is the key differentiator here.

Preussen Münster are bottom of the table with 0 wins in their last 5, scoring just 2 goals and conceding 13. Bielefeld have been inconsistent but carry more quality and should edge this relegation battle.
Karlsruhe have scored 12 goals in their last 5 matches, while Hannover are unbeaten in five with 2 wins and 3 draws. Both sides find the net regularly and the over 2.5 market is heavily favoured.
Hertha have won 4 of their last 5, picking up 13 points from 15 and mounting a late promotion charge. Holstein Kiel have 3 wins in 5 but Hertha's home momentum should prove decisive.
Fulham are unbeaten in 5 league matches and have conceded just 1 goal in that run. Aston Villa sit 4th and have won 5 of the last 6 head-to-head meetings. A tight but open contest is expected.
Rostov have lost 3 of their last 5 but face an Orenburg side also struggling for form. Rostov's home advantage in the Russian Premier League should be enough to secure a narrow win.
Eyüpspor had four straight defeats before a recent away win. Gaziantep's last five read win-loss-draw-loss-win, including a 4-1 success at Antalyaspor. Both defences are vulnerable.
Alaves have taken maximum points in 3 of their last 5 home meetings against Mallorca, who have won just 1 of their last 5 overall. A tight, low-scoring encounter favours the hosts.
Lyon have gone 5 matches without a win but face an Auxerre side that has also struggled for victories. Lyon's superior squad quality at home should break the stalemate.
Parma have drawn 3 of their last 5 and are tough to beat at home. Pisa travel with decent form. The odds suggest value on goals in what should be an evenly matched Serie A contest.
Augsburg are winless in 5, scoring just 6 and conceding 12. Eintracht Frankfurt have 2 wins in their last 5 and won the reverse fixture in December. The visitors are rightly favoured.
Köln have drawn four of their last five, playing attractive but leaky football. Leverkusen's attacking quality is undeniable and this Rhine derby rarely disappoints for goals.
Wolfsburg are unbeaten in 5, winning 3 of them, and are pushing for European places. M'gladbach have been inconsistent on the road, making the home side a solid pick.
Liverpool are in imperious form, unbeaten in 5 with four wins, conceding just 2 goals. Crystal Palace have been decent but Anfield is a fortress where the Reds normally dominate.
Wolves are in a tailspin, without a win in 5 and conceding heavily. Tottenham are flying high in the title race, unbeaten in 5 with 4 wins, and should have too much firepower.
West Ham have been inconsistent but are tough to break down at home. Everton have found some form with back-to-back wins. A cagey, low-scoring London Stadium affair is expected.
